using System;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    [global::System.CodeDom.Compiler.GeneratedCode("DesignPatterns.SourceGenerators", "1.0")]
    public static partial class TextProcessorKeys
    {
        public const string Upper = "upper";
    }
}// <auto-generated />

,
  ITextProcessor.TextProcessorRegistry.g.cs:
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using DesignPatterns.Behavioral;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    [global::System.CodeDom.Compiler.GeneratedCode("DesignPatterns.SourceGenerators", "1.0")]
    public static partial class TextProcessorRegistry
    {
        private static readonly IStrategyRegistry<string, global::TestAssembly.ITextProcessor> _instance = new StrategyRegistry<string, global::TestAssembly.ITextProcessor>(new Dictionary<string, global::TestAssembly.ITextProcessor> { ["upper"] = new global::TestAssembly.UpperProcessor() }, new Dictionary<string, global::System.Func<string, bool>> { ["upper"] = global::TestAssembly.UpperProcessor.CanUse });
        public static IStrategyRegistry<string, global::TestAssembly.ITextProcessor> Instance
        {
            get
            {
                return _instance;
            }
        }
    }
}// <auto-generated />
// Generated by DesignPatterns.SourceGenerators.RegisterStrategyGenerator
